word: G1463 - ἐγκομβόομαι - enkombóomai - eng-kom-bo'-om-ahee - Be clothed with

sections.paragraph:
ἐγκομβόομαι - egkomboomai - eng-kom-bo'-om-ahee

Middle voice from G1722 κομβόω komboō (to gird); to engirdle oneself (for labor), that is, figuratively (the apron being a badge of servitude) to wear (in token of mutual deference): - be clothed with.
